Inheritance Calculator

Calculate inheritance shares according to Islamic Sharia law

Affects certain cases like grandfather with siblings and al-mushtaraka

1

Estate Data

Bequests cannot exceed one-third of the estate for non-heirs

3

1
4

Results

⚠️
Note: Awl occurred in this case
Awl means the total fixed shares exceed the estate base, so all shares are proportionally reduced.
ℹ️
Note: Radd occurred in this case
Radd means the total fixed shares don't exhaust the estate and there's no residuary heir, so the remainder is returned proportionally to fixed-share heirs.
Heir Share Amount Type Explanation

🚫 Blocked Heirs

    Total Distributed 0
    No heirs selected

    ⚠️ Important Notes

    • This calculator is for guidance only and is not a religious ruling (fatwa).
    • It is recommended to consult a qualified Islamic scholar or Sharia court.
    • A deliberate killer and a person of different religion do not inherit.

    📖 How to Use

    Enter the estate amount, debts, and bequests, then select the deceased's gender, then choose the existing heirs and their numbers. Results will appear automatically showing each heir's share and its Sharia basis.
